ChangeRequest.name: Optionality of relationships between `Instrument`(s) and associated `Party role`(s)
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview
Optionality of relationship types seem incorrect, fix required.
### Contact person
dominik.lin-ully@oenb.at
### Description of change request
The optionality of the relationship types connecting the subtypes of the `Instrument` entity type with their associated subtypes of the `Party role` entity type seem to be incorrect - they are optional but in my opinion should be mandatory.
For example, an `Other loan` must have at least one `Loan debtor`, however the relationship type between `Other loan` and `Other loan Loan debtor assignment` is optional.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
All subtypes of the `Instrument Entity role assignment` entity type.
### Forward Engineering considerations _[Other considerations]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
